# Data Quality Assessment

`PedigreeScore` objects are assigned to each [`Product`](products-and-processes.md#pod_lca.materials_screening.Product) object and can be accessed from [`get_pedigree_score()`](products-and-processes.md#pod_lca.materials_screening.Master.get_pedigree_score).

`DataQualityAnalysis` object carries out the data quality assesment for a model and would return data quality scores: `get_model_DQS()` and `get_normalised_DQS()`.

---
